mainEntity.name: Vocational rehab after forklift head injury in Draper UT?
mainEntity.text: Vocational rehab after forklift head injury in Draper UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah comp funds retraining if injury prevents forklift/warehouse return; up to 312 weeks total disability during program.

suggestedAnswer.text: TBI from Draper pallet strikes qualifies for counselor assessment, tuition. Insurers resist; prove via functional capacity eval. Retrain for desk roles boosts settlement.

name: Voc Rehab for Forklift Head Injuries Draper
description: Utah comp funds retraining if injury prevents forklift/warehouse return; up to 312 weeks total disability during program.
